name: Great Chocolate Cake and Strawberry Shortcake Variation
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cocoa with boiling water, stirring with a wire whisk until smooth. Cool in refrigerator while preparing other ingredients.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract on high speed for 5 minutes.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together.
4. Add dry ingredients to the wet mixture alternately with cocoa and boiling water, starting and ending with flour. Do not overbeat.
5. Divide batter evenly into two 9-inch round pans lined with buttered wax paper.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in center tests dry.
7. Cool cakes in pans for 10 minutes, then remove and cool on wire racks.
8. Use one layer of cake for the Great Strawberry Chocolate Shortcake dessert. The second layer may be frozen for other great chocolate desserts or the two layers may be frosted together.
9. For shortcake: Whip cream with powdered sugar and vanilla extract until stiff peaks form. Spread over top of one layer of cake.
10. Arrange fresh strawberries on top. Melt chocolate and drizzle over berries. Chill to firm chocolate.
11. Makes 8 servings.
